scripts.build: dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 SRAFrontend/SRAFrontend.sln && python scripts/package.py
scripts.modelgen: python scripts/model_gen.py SRAFrontend/SRAFrontend/Models/AppSettings.cs -o SRACore/models/app_settings.py && python scripts/model_gen.py SRAFrontend/SRAFrontend/Models/TasksConfig.cs -o SRACore/models/tasks_config.py
